Generated Narrative: ImplementationGuide cancerscreeningcds.fhir.us.crcsm-cds

crcsmcds

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

http://cancerscreeningcds.github.io/crcsm-cds/ImplementationGuide/cancerscreeningcds.fhir.us.crcsm-cds

name: crcsmcds
title: Colorectal Cancer Screening and Management (CRCSM) Clinical Decision Support (CDS) Implementation Guide

extension.valueMarkdown: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

resource.name: Communicate Eligible
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest containing information about the patient's ineligibility for screening.

resource.name: Communicate Not Eligible
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest containing information about the patient's ineligibility for screening.

resource.name: Communicate Recommendation to Stop Screening
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending to stop screening.

resource.name: Communicate Shared Decision Making to Continue Screening
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending shared decision making on the decision to continue screening.

resource.name: CT Colonography Reporting and Data System (C-RADS)
resource.description: Codes for C-RADS v2005 colorectal finding categories.

resource.name: CT Colonography Reporting and Data System (C-RADS)
resource.description: Codes for C-RADS v2023 colorectal finding categories.

resource.name: Family History of Colorectal Cancer Questionnaire
Plan Definition Action Code System
resource.description: Code representing plan definition action codes

resource.name: Plan Definition Action Codes
resource.description: This value set includes action codes for Plan Definitions within this implementation guide.

resource.name: Plan Definition Action Reason Code System
resource.description: Code representing plan definition action reason codes

resource.name: Plan Definition Action Reason Codes
resource.description: This value set includes action reason codes for Plan Definitions within this implementation guide.

resource.name: Screening Eligible Questionnaire Task
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a Questionnaire Task containing a request to complete a questionnaire.

resource.name: Screening Observation Code System
resource.description: Code representing cancer screening related observations
